frame_analyses.description: Instructor holding laparoscopic scissors above the training board with multiple gauze squares marked with circular cutting patterns. Scissors appear to be laparoscopic grasper/cutter hybrid instrument.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This is an expert demonstration showing correct instrument positioning. Gauze squares are suspended on blue training board with clear circular pattern marks visible.

frame_analyses.description: Instructor positioning cutting instrument to approach the marked circular pattern. Gauze is properly suspended and ready for cutting.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper approach angle - scissors held at approximately 90 degrees to the gauze surface for optimal cutting control.

frame_analyses.description: Scissors beginning to cut the circular pattern. Instructor initiates cutting at one point on the marked circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean initiation of cut along the marked line. Demonstrates starting the incision at a definite point on the circumference.

frame_analyses.description: Continuing circular cut progression. Instrument following the marked circular line as scissors advance clockwise around the pattern.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth scissor motion with steady progression. Maintains alignment with the 2mm margin requirement. Shows proper wrist rotation technique.

frame_analyses.description: Further progression of the circular cut. Approximately 1/3 of the circle completed. Gauze remains properly suspended between clamps.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent cutting technique maintained. No deviation from marked line visible. Demonstrates patience and controlled motion.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progresses to approximately the midpoint of the circle. Cut line remains aligned with the marked pattern.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintains perpendicular approach angle throughout. No tension on the gauze - clean suspension maintained.

frame_analyses.description: Nearing completion of the clockwise cutting phase. Approximately 3/4 of the circle is now cut.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cutting accuracy appears excellent. Line follows marked circle closely - deviation minimal if any.

frame_analyses.description: Final closure of the circular cut. Scissors completing the loop to fully excise the marked circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean final cut connecting back to starting point. Demonstrates expert precision in completing the circular pattern.

frame_analyses.description: Instructor has completed the cutting of one gauze circle. The excised circular piece is separated from the remaining gauze.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Complete circle successfully cut. Gauze remains properly positioned on the board. No detachment from clamps observed.

frame_analyses.description: Instructor moving to the next marked pattern on an adjacent gauze square to demonstrate the cutting technique on multiple targets.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates efficiency in transitioning between multiple patterns. Shows that the technique is reproducible.

frame_analyses.description: Beginning another circular pattern cut on a different gauze square. Scissors positioned at the starting point of the marked circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Replicates the same controlled approach technique shown in the first cut. Consistent methodology demonstrated.

frame_analyses.description: Continued demonstration on multiple gauze patterns. Instructor showing proficiency across multiple repetitions.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Expert-level consistency demonstrated. Cutting margins remain within acceptable tolerance across all attempts visible.

assessment_note: This video is classified as INSTRUCTIONAL/EXPERT DEMONSTRATION content, not a scored performance. It shows an expert proctor or senior surgeon demonstrating the proper technique for the Pattern Cut task. No trainee performance score is applicable. The video is educational in nature, showing correct technique for training purposes.
reason_no_score: This is an expert demonstration video with an instructor showing the correct methodology for the Pattern Cut task. No individual trainee performance is being evaluated. Per assessment rules, expert demonstration videos are documented for teaching content only and not scored as individual performances.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper laparoscopic scissor grip and control
Perpendicular approach angle to gauze surface (90 degrees)
Smooth, controlled scissor advancement around circular pattern
Maintaining alignment with marked cutting line (within 2mm tolerance)
Steady wrist rotation for circular motion
Smooth progression from initiation through completion
Prevention of gauze tension during cutting
Maintaining instrument control throughout full circle
Clean circular cut closure (connection of start and end points)
Proper repositioning for sequential pattern cuts
verbal_cues: Implied instruction through visual demonstration of proper technique
common_errors_addressed: Deviation from marked line (demonstrated avoidance by staying within 2mm)
Applying excessive tension to gauze (shown by maintaining slack)
Loss of instrument control during rotation (prevented through steady wrist technique)
Incomplete cuts (demonstrated proper closure of circle)
Gauze detachment from clamps (none observed - proper suspension maintained throughout)
key_performance_indicators: Completion time per circle: approximately 25-32 seconds (well within expert range of 60-90s for full task)
Cutting precision: appears to be within 1-2mm of marked line at all cardinal points
No gauze slippage or detachment observed

confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows expert demonstration of the Pattern Cut task. All frames are well-lit and high-quality with clear visibility of cutting technique, gauze positioning, and pattern alignment. No ambiguity regarding classification as instructional content.
cannot_determine: Individual trainee performance score - this is not a scored performance
Exact mm deviation at each cardinal point - demonstration does not require quantification
Penalty calculations - not applicable to instructional content
overall_assessment: Expert-level demonstration of the Pattern Cut task showing excellent technique, precision, and reproducibility. The video effectively illustrates proper cutting methodology, instrument control, and pattern adherence for training purposes.
